/CAL:CJC ASSESSMENT/INTC/CONTD:CJC PRG RPT AND PTC/DOP/CTORD:STAY AWAY ORDER ISSUED ON 12-04-20 IS HEREBY TERMINATED,NEW STAY AWAY ORDER ISSUED/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO STAY AWAY 150 YARDS FROM TURK AND LARKIN STREETS, SF EXCEPT TO ALLOW TO ATTEND COLLABORATIVE COURT,MEET CASE MANAGER AND FOLLOW TREATMENT PLAN/SAORD/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONTD:COMMUNITY JUSTICE COURT/DOP/INTC/EMMOD:DESPITE BEING AFFIXED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND SUBJECT TO STAY-AWAY ORDERS, THE DEFENDANT MAY ATTEND COMMUNITY JUSTICE COURT AT 575 POLK ST,, SF/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONT/DAWF/INTC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE,THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSOCOMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/

/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/INTC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANTIS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONT/DOP/X: THE 01-15-21 COURT DATE IN M11 IS CONFIRMED/
